title: gaya nutans
intro: Gaya nutans, also known as the bladder senna or geyaya, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and laxative effects due to the presence of anthraquinones in its leaves and pods. The health benefits of Gaya nutans include treating constipation, hemorrhoids, and other digestive issues, as well as reducing inflammation and fever. In herbal preparations, Gaya nutans is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions to treat various ailments, but its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
